summary: E2E tested HamperStore across storefront, checkout, custom orders, admin dashboard. Core flows work: register/login, PDP pincode check, add-to-cart, checkout with coupon WELCOME10, mock payment, order success (Order HS1783249215 confirmed with total ₹3599 after 10% discount), custom order submission (custom-order-success visible), newsletter subscribe, admin login redirect to /admin, dashboard stats (stat-revenue), create new product (visible in list), create new coupon (TEST9202 visible in list).
passed: Backend /api/auth/login admin returns token + role admin
PDP add-to-cart-btn works, cart drawer auto-opens
checkout-btn navigates to /checkout (protected route works with token)
Checkout: address form fill, WELCOME10 coupon apply (discount reflected), pm-mock selection, ck-place-order → order-success page shows order number and total
Custom order form (/custom-order) submits and shows custom-order-success screen
Admin login redirects to /admin, dashboard shows stat-revenue tile
Admin -> New Product form fills and saves; product appears in list
Admin -> Coupons: cp-code + cp-create adds coupon (TEST9202 visible)
Pincode-check-btn on PDP shows Delivery available message

failed.issue: data-testid='contact-email' is applied to TWO elements (outer wrapper div + inner input), causing Playwright to resolve to the div and Playwright fill() throws 'Element is not an input'. Same pattern likely for contact-name/subject/message.
failed.evidence: Playwright: 'locator resolved to 2 elements. Proceeding with the first one: <div ... data-testid="contact-email">'

failed.issue: HTML <title> tag still shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'HamperStore'. The main agent claimed this was fixed but page.title() confirms it is not.
failed.evidence: Title: 'Emergent | Fullstack App' on / page load

failed.issue: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — likely inside a Select component, non-blocking but pollutes console.
failed.evidence: CONSOLE[error]: In HTML, %s cannot be a child of <%s>

not_tested: Admin custom-request quote flow (quote-btn-{id}, quote-price, quote-eta, quote-send)
action_items: Remove duplicate data-testid='contact-email' (and siblings) from the wrapper div in Contact.jsx — keep it only on the actual <input>/<textarea>.
Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> to 'HamperStore' (still shows the Emergent default).
Fix the <span> inside <option> in a Select to avoid hydration warning.

success_rate.frontend: 91% (10/11 flows attempted passed; contact form blocked by duplicate testid)
